The '''59th [[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from 5 February to 15 February 2009.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2009/01_jahresblatt_2009/01_Jahresblatt_2009.html |title=59TH BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL FEBRUARY 5 - 15, 2009 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131104212738/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2009/01_jahresblatt_2009/01_Jahresblatt_2009.html| archive-date=4 November 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref> The opening film of the festival was [[Tom Tykwer]]’s ''[[The International (2009 film)|The International]]'', screened out of competition.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.barco.com/en/News/Press-releases/59th-Berlinale-kicks-off-with-The-International-on-Barcos-digital-cinema-projectors.aspx |title=59th Berlinale kicks off with The International on Barco's digital cinema projectors |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=barco.com |archive-date=1 July 2018 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180701193804/https://www.barco.com/en/News/Press-releases/59th-Berlinale-kicks-off-with-The-International-on-Barcos-digital-cinema-projectors.aspx |url-status=dead }}</ref> [[Costa-Gavras]]'s ''[[Eden Is West]]'' served as the closing night film at the festival.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2009/08_pressemitteilungen_2009/08_Pressemitteilungen_2009-Detail_5103.html |title=BERLINALE 2009 COMES TO A SUCCESSFUL CLOSE: A FANTASTIC ATMOSPHERE AND ENTHUSIASTIC AUDIENCES |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20100330113851/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2009/08_pressemitteilungen_2009/08_Pressemitteilungen_2009-Detail_5103.html| archive-date=30 March 2010 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2009/film/news/milk-of-sorrow-wins-golden-bear-1118000167/ |title='Milk of Sorrow' wins Golden Bear |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=variety.com|date=14 February 2009 }}</ref> The festival's jury president was the British actress [[Tilda Swinton]].<ref>[http://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/wettbewerb/wettbewerb-presse-detail_4565.html Berlinale 2009: Academy Award–Winner Tilda Swinton will be Jury President]</ref>

The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to Peruvian film ''[[The Milk of Sorrow]]'' directed by [[Claudia Llosa]].<ref name="PRIZES" /> The retrospective dedicated to the Golden Age of [[70 mm film|70mm filmmaking]] from 1955 to 1970, titled ''70mm – Bigger than Life'' was shown at the festival.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html#|title=RETROSPECTIVE|access-date=28 August 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170304113847/http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html|archive-date=4 March 2017|url-status=dead|df=dmy-all}}</ref>

Admission for the festival was reported to be among the highest in years, and it also set a record for ticket sales, with some 270,000 tickets sold by the halfway mark, compared to 240,000 sold for the entire run of the festival the previous year.<ref name="hollywood"/> The final ticket tally was the largest in the festival's 59-year history.<ref name="hollywood">{{cite web|url=http://www.hollywoodreporter.com/hr/festival/berlinale-to-break-sales-record-1003940457.story|title=Berlinale to break sales record|work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]]|author=Scott Roxborough|date=2009-02-11}}</ref>

== Juries ==
[[File:Tilda Swinton (Berlin Film Festival 2010) cropped.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Tilda Swinton]], Jury President]]
The following people were announced as being on the jury for the festival:<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2009/04_jury_2009/04_Jury_2009.html |title=JURIES 2009 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131023103244/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2009/04_jury_2009/04_Jury_2009.html| archive-date=23 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Tilda Swinton]], British actress - Jury President
* [[Isabel Coixet]], Spanish filmmaker
* [[Gaston Kaboré]], Burkinabé filmmaker
* [[Henning Mankell]], Swedish writer
* [[Christoph Schlingensief]], German playwright and director
* [[Wayne Wang]], Hong Kong director, screenwriter and producer
* [[Alice Waters]], American author

=== Best First Feature Award Jury ===
* [[Hannah Herzsprung]], German actress
* [[In-Ah Lee]], German producer
* [[Rafi Pitts]], Iranian director

=== International Short Film Jury ===
* [[Khavn De La Cruz]], Filipino director, screenwriter and producer
* [[Arta Dobroshi]], Kosovo actress
* Lars Henrik Gass, German director of the [[International Short Film Festival Oberhausen]]

==Official Awards==
[[File:Claudia Llosa (113).jpg|thumb|200px|[[Claudia Llosa]], winner of the Golden Bear at the festival]]
The following prizes were awarded by the Jury:<ref name="PRIZES">{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2009/03_preistr_ger_2009/03_Preistraeger_2009.html |title=PRIZES & HONOURS 2009|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131015121846/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2009/03_preistr_ger_2009/03_Preistraeger_2009.html| archive-date=15 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/59_ifb/59_IFB_Awards.pdf |title=2009 Berlin Awards|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130516060819/http://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/59_ifb/59_IFB_Awards.pdf| archive-date=16 May 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>

===Main Competition===

* [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[The Milk of Sorrow]]'' by [[Claudia Llosa]]

*[[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize]]:
**Adrián Biniez for ''[[Giant (2009 film)|Giant]]''
**[[Maren Ade]] for ''[[Alle Anderen|Everyone Else]]''
*[[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Asghar Farhadi]] for ''[[About Elly]]''
*[[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Sotigui Kouyaté]] for ''[[London River]]''
*[[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Birgit Minichmayr]] for [[Alle Anderen|''Everyone Else'']]
*[[Silver Bear for Best Screenplay]]: [[Oren Moverman]] and [[Alessandro Camon]] for ''[[The Messenger (2009 film)|The Messenger]]''
*'''Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': György Kovács, Gábor ifj. Erdélyi and Tamás Székely for [[Katalin Varga (film)|''Katalin Varga'']] (sound design)
*[[Alfred Bauer Prize]]:
**[[Andrzej Wajda]] for ''[[Sweet Rush (film)|Tatarak]]''
**Adrián Biniez for [[Giant (2009 film)|''Giant'']]

== Independent Awards ==

=== [[International Federation of Film Critics#FIPRESCI Award|FIPRESCI Award]] ===
*[[Claudia Llosa]] for ''[[La teta asustada|The Milk of Sorrow]]''
